standout_players: Lionel Messi dazzles; hat-trick to equal World Cup scoring record
fatigue_injuries: Messi was recovering from a muscle injury in recent weeks
home_read.momentum: Positive momentum; three points secured, nudging Argentina toward the last 32; Messi poised to add to his history against Austria.

away_read.momentum: Under pressure after the defeat; must-win upcoming match (vs Jordan); finishing needs to improve.
